revision.comment: updating to match edits by Zozo2kx
increasing width to match WP:MOS recommendation
moved [[User:Astynax/Infobox Archaeological site]] to [[Template:Infobox ancient site]]: moving from sandbox to live
adding option for local name/native name beneath the title/English name
put title back above, will fix later
changed map location symbol from black to dark red
add the microformat listed in the documentation!
Protected Template:Infobox ancient site: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([edit=sysop] (indefinite) [move=sysop] (indefinite))
only show the caption if the image or map is there
Removed protection from "[[Template:Infobox ancient site]]": per [[User talk:KFP#Template protection]]: transclusion count doesn't justify protection at this time
native name in separate row; & native_name_lang
Nominated for merging with [[Template:Infobox dava]]; see [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2014 April 21#Template:Infobox dava]]. ([[WP:TW|TW]])
so important we had to include it twice
Undid revision 605160291 by [[Special:Contributions/Frietjes|Frietjes]] ([[User talk:Frietjes|talk]]) Actually, this.
rem TfD note; no need to keep this displayed on all articles, especially since this template won't be affected by the merger
better default caption for map (as in other infoboxes e.g. building)
changed to other mark - IMO, now it will be better
Undid revision 648776565 by [[Special:Contributions/Edgars2007|Edgars2007]] ([[User talk:Edgars2007|talk]]) - it took a little bit more than few minutes, but now i'm done
renumber for insertion of grid_position to be imported from [[template:infobox building]] and [[template:infobox settlement]]
add grid_position as requested by [[User:Huldra|Huldra]], code imported from [[template:infobox settlement]] and [[template:infobox building]]
There are already parameters listed on [[Template:Infobox ancient site#Designations]] that should be used, or use the "other_designation" parameter
rm incompliant colours and colour parameters, use caption for title to improve accessibility, cleanup
Increase image_upright to match earlier hardcoded image width
remove [[Template:Check ISO 639-1]] - this disallows valid language codes under ISO 639-2 etc.
Add image size parameter for merge from [[Template:Infobox Pre-Columbian site]]
Undid revision 712094856 by [[Special:Contributions/BU Rob13|BU Rob13]] ([[User talk:BU Rob13|talk]]). Proliferation of parameters not needed - going to make a wrapper and substitute instead
Add altitude parameters (merge from Infobox dava)
add parameter for year of discovery
replace {{PAGENAME}} with {{PAGENAMEBASE}} to remove any disambiguation if article name is used as infobox title, using [[Project:AWB|AWB]]
Adding unknown parameter tracking through [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] using [[Module:check for unknown parameters]]
Convert coordinates to new parameters, see [[Wikipedia:Coordinates in infoboxes]]
Convert coords to new parameters. See [[Wikipedia:Coordinates in infoboxes]].
Convert coords to new parameters. See [[Wikipedia:Coordinates in infoboxes]].
added Identifiers section with fields for NHLE and Atlas of Hillforts nos.
Nominated for merging with [[Template:Infobox historic site]]; see [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2017 July 15#Template:Infobox historic site]]. ([[WP:TW|TW]])
add embedde to list of known parameters
Updating TFD template: discussion was relisted ([[WP:XFDC|XFDcloser]])
Protected "[[Template:Infobox ancient site]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]; thousands of transclusions ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
allow adjusting mark size, should go in doc along with label parameter
add gbgridref to 'Check for unknown parameters'
add hillfort to 'Check for unknown parameters'
add nhle to 'Check for unknown parameters'
add precolumbian to 'Check for unknown parameters'
Use default_width to allow scaling so that vertical maps won't be overly enlarged

Changed protection level for "[[Template:Infobox ancient site]]": [[WP:HIGHRISK|high-risk]] template with 2000+ transclusions ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
add embed to recognized parameters per request by DePiep
Change span class=xxx to div to fix [[Special:LintErrors|Linter]] div-span-flip error.
Undid revision 920919726 by [[Special:Contributions/Trappist the monk|Trappist the monk]] ([[User talk:Trappist the monk|talk]])- per request on talk page
Added field for Middle Eastern Geodatabase for Antiquities – Jordan (MEGA-J) identifier
Adding mapframe mapping capability per [[Wikipedia:Requests for comment/Mapframe maps in infoboxes]]
reach into location map a bit more
1 revision imported: impoting nglish ikipdia tmplats
set historic as the default mapframe icon marker

Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1255471305|1255471305]] by [[Special:Contributions/Joy|Joy]] ([[User talk:Joy|talk]]). See [[Template_talk:Infobox_ancient_site/Archive_1#Three_dots_rather_than_one]] – this is unnecessary and confusing when there's only one marker
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:en>Jonesey95|en>Jonesey95]]
using mass replace to fix all faulty capitalizations of the image parameter forr infibox ancient site
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:en>Jonesey95|en>Jonesey95]]
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:en>Jonesey95|en>Jonesey95]]

154 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Infobox_ancient_site]]: Import just to get the source
moving the kofun template to the bottom of each page
attempting to add burial goods parameter
Copying from [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
